tasks.title: Clean SaaS Vendor Packet
tasks.objective: Review the dossier and decide whether the vendor should be approved, escalated, or rejected.

panels.title: Vendor Overview
panels.summary: Northwind Analytics LLC supplies dashboard software for internal planning teams.
details: Business address: 480 Hudson Street, New York, NY 10014
Primary contact: Priya Raman, Finance Operations Director

panels.title: Tax Form
panels.summary: Signed W-9 on file.
details: Entity classification: LLC taxed as corporation

panels.title: Bank Confirmation Letter
panels.summary: Bank account ownership matches the legal entity.
details: Letter signed by branch operations manager

panels.title: Beneficial Owners
panels.summary: Ownership disclosure is complete and internally consistent.
details: No other individual owns more than 25%

panels.title: Sanctions Screening
panels.summary: No sanctions or watchlist hits returned.
details: Result: No exact or fuzzy matches above alert threshold
Jurisdictions checked: OFAC, UK HMT, EU

panels.title: Analyst Notes
panels.summary: Prior review found no concerns.
details: Requested service is low-risk analytics software.
Supporting documents were complete on first submission.
No manual escalation requested by procurement.

panels.title: Policy Excerpt
panels.summary: Approval is allowed when identity, ownership, banking, and sanctions checks are clean.
details: Approve when legal entity and bank ownership align.
Escalate if a key document is missing or materially inconsistent.
Reject if a sanctions exact match is corroborated.

tasks.title: Bank Ownership Mismatch
tasks.objective: Review the vendor packet and identify whether the payment instructions require escalation.

panels.title: Vendor Overview
panels.summary: Silverline Freight Systems provides route planning software.
details: Legal name: Silverline Freight Systems Inc.
Business address: 8901 Orion Park, Dallas, TX 75201

panels.title: Tax Form
panels.summary: Signed W-9 is present.

panels.title: Bank Confirmation Letter
panels.summary: Account owner does not match the legal vendor name.
details: Account owner: Skyline Logistics Holdings LLC
Vendor requested remittance to the attached account

panels.title: Beneficial Owners
panels.summary: Ownership disclosure appears complete.

panels.title: Sanctions Screening
panels.summary: No sanctions hits returned.
details: Jurisdictions checked: OFAC, UK HMT, EU

panels.title: Analyst Notes
panels.summary: Procurement flagged a possible remittance issue.
details: The requested account name differs from the contracting entity.
No parent-company payment exception was approved.
Escalation required before vendor activation if ownership mismatch persists.

panels.title: Policy Excerpt
panels.summary: Payment instructions must align with the contracted entity unless compliance approves an exception.
details: Escalate when bank account ownership differs from the legal vendor name.
Do not approve onboarding until the discrepancy is resolved or exceptioned.
Reject only for prohibited-party or fraud indicators.

tasks.title: Sanctioned Beneficial Owner
tasks.objective: Determine whether the vendor should be rejected after reviewing ownership, sanctions, and corroborating notes.

panels.title: Vendor Overview
panels.summary: Helios Maritime Procurement Ltd. requests onboarding for sourcing support.
details: Primary contact: Daria Petrov, Operations Lead

panels.title: Tax Form
panels.summary: Corporate registration and tax certificate were supplied.

panels.title: Bank Confirmation Letter
panels.summary: Bank ownership aligns with the legal entity.
details: Account owner: Helios Maritime Procurement Ltd.

panels.title: Beneficial Owners
panels.summary: Disclosure lists a controlling shareholder not mentioned in onboarding notes.

panels.title: Sanctions Screening
panels.summary: Exact sanctions match returned for the controlling shareholder.
details: Date of birth and passport country align with disclosure file

panels.title: Analyst Notes
panels.summary: Manual review corroborates the sanctions alert.
details: Public registry links Sergei Volkov to the disclosed ownership stake.
The vendor omitted a prior alias used in shipping records.
Compliance policy indicates rejection when ownership is tied to a confirmed sanctions hit.

panels.title: Policy Excerpt
panels.summary: Confirmed exact sanctions matches tied to controlling ownership require rejection.
details: Reject when an exact sanctions hit is corroborated by ownership evidence.
Escalation is insufficient when the prohibited party is the controlling shareholder.
Document both the sanctions hit and the ownership inconsistency in the case file.
